_comment: Manual overrides for command-api-mapping.json. Entries here replace (not merge with) the auto-generated data. Structure mirrors command-api-mapping.json: { "COMMAND": { "api_calls": { "client_id": [...signatures...] } } }

redis_py.signature: def set(name, value, ex=None, px=None, nx=False, xx=False)

returns.description: True if SET was executed successfully
